descriptions: Added Mobile Banking App support for Road Phone — installs and runs natively alongside the existing LB Phone integration.
Added Mobile Banking App support for YSeries — full feature parity with the LB Phone version.
Both new phone integrations include the full banking feature set: home dashboard, deposits/withdrawals/transfers, card management, account settings, and shared account permissions.
Various smaller improvements and refinements across the resource for better stability and overall UX.
